productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Blue Chelsea FC T-shirt
description: Style Note adidas helps you avoid discomfort by keeping you dry and comfortable. This tee offers you a stylised look that will make sure you look great on your day off. Pair it with a pair of jeans and sports shoes on the weekend. Product Details Blue T-shirt, has a round neckline, graphic print in front, short sleeves and branding above the hemline in front on the left Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry clean Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
